# Project Reference - frontend

> **IMPORTANT:** These are summaries. READ the full doc file when working in the matching context.

## [Frontend Patterns Reference](../../docs/project-reference/frontend-patterns-reference.md)

**Summary:** Angular 19 + Nx + NgRx ComponentStore + Material 3 conventions — `AppBase*` component base classes (never extend `Platform*` directly), `PlatformVmStore` state with `effectSimple()`/`tapResponse()`, view-model pattern, `PlatformApiService` HTTP services, DTO patterns, reactive forms, `.pipe(this.untilDestroyed())` subscription cleanup, and BEM on every template element.

> **READ** `docs/project-reference/frontend-patterns-reference.md` when: Creating or modifying Angular components, stores, view models, API services, forms, or templates; ensuring leak-free subscriptions and correct base-class usage.
